overview: Premium 3D luxury website for AS Makeover and Makeup Studio — SFX & Prosthetic Makeup specialists in Jodhpur, Rajasthan. Features full Three.js 3D animations, beige/brown luxury theme with glow effects, complete portfolio gallery, celebrity work showcase, reviews, FAQ, and interactive contact features.
features: 3D animated hero with Three.js particle canvas
Premium beige/brown luxury theme with glow effects
